landing.headline: Settle Globally.
landing.description: The next-generation merchant payment platform for African businesses. Accept USDC, auto-convert via SEP-24 anchors, and get settled directly to your bank.
landing.featuresDescription: Enterprise-grade payment infrastructure designed for speed, low fees, and perfect transparency.

settlement.title: Instant Settlement
settlement.description: Transactions settle in 3-5 seconds. No more waiting days for cross-border wires to clear.

offRamps.title: SEP-24 Fiat Off-Ramps
offRamps.description: Automated routing to Stellar Anchors for direct-to-bank Nigerian Naira payouts.

fees.title: Smart Fee Splits
fees.description: Soroban contracts automatically calculate and route platform fees trustlessly on-chain.

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to manage your payments, view settlements, and accept crypto from customers worldwide.

settlement.title: Instant settlement
settlement.description: Transactions settle in seconds on Stellar Soroban

currency.title: Multi-currency
currency.description: Accept USDC, auto-convert to local fiat

custody.title: Non-custodial
custody.description: You always control your funds and keys
